name: Mauritius Mass Finder v24.11
release: v24.11 French Near Me Translation Fix
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Bugfix release: fixes French translation for the Near Me results heading, preserving native sharing, time-of-day filtering, compact mobile quick cards, corrected French location notice, and Near Me ranking precedence.
